title: Free Farming
description: I saw that swords instantly break bamboo, but still use twice the durability. So I made a mod that does everything but fix that.
body:
Free Farming is a small content mod that adds a couple of new crops to the game, a tool to harvest those crops, and other food-related items.

Tomatoes: Tomatoes can be grown on farmland, like any other crop. They have seven stages, and when fully grown, yield some tomatoes. The tomatoes can be crafted into tomato soup and used to make pizza.

Rice: Rice can also be grown on farmland, and when fully grown, yields a rice crop, similar to wheat. Rice can be made with cooked meat into various rice bowls, which give healing boosts when consumed. The duration depends on the type of meat.

Cheese: Cheese has a whole process to obtain it. First you must make the curds from milk, then use the curds for a cheese block. Placing the cheese block will allow it to age into cheese, which you can harvest for cheese slices. Cheese can be eaten or used for pizza.

Made using MCreator.

You may use this mod in any of your modpacks. If you want to make add-ons, ask me please.


|| KNOWN ISSUES ||

~~- The texture of both crops has a black outline, however, I don’t know how to fix it.~~ Fixed.
